mapper.select: select source, channel, activity_id, goods_id from sc_sku_activity where goods_id = #{goodsId} and source = #{source} and channel = #{channel} order by id desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into sc_sku_activity (source, channel, activity_id, goods_id, create_time, update_time) values (#{source}, #{channel}, #{activityId}, #{goodsId}, now(), now()) on duplicate key update activity_id = values(activity_id), update_time = now()
